sub_mechanisms: M_1: per-token attention Laplacian L = D - A
M_3: Hilbert-Pólya-style spectral hypothesis test on eigenvalue spacings
M_4: hallucination flag from spacing-distribution deviation
stripped_llm_application: For each token, build the attention Laplacian L = D - A from the attention map; compute top-k eigenvalues; test whether their nearest-neighbor spacings follow the predicted GUE/GOE distribution under a Hilbert-Pólya-style spectral hypothesis; flag hallucination when the spacing distribution deviates.
novelty_claim_stripped: LapEigvals (arXiv:2502.17598) uses Laplacian top-k eigenvalues directly as input to a hallucination probe; the spectral-hypothesis spacing-distribution test is NOT used.
